channel.title: strava on Blommaerts Edwin
channel.description: Recent content in strava on Blommaerts Edwin

item.title: I'll be back, I'm baaaack!
item.description: Here we go again After two weeks and some change I’ve picked up running again. I feel that actually did my body a wealth of good. It’s hard to fit in the running around a very busy family and work life but I have to do this. Since I picked up running I feel better mentally and physically. It’s so easy to slide back into an old routine, especially when time is so precious and needs to be spent well if you have a lot on.
